summary: Iteration 45: Phase 1 - Open Positions visibility and unrealized PnL on strategy pages. All features verified working. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI verified via Playwright.

backend_api_tests: Response has positions, summaries, total_unrealized_pnl, total_open - PASS
Positions grouped by strategy (weather: 54, crypto: 11, arb: 21) - PASS
Each summary has required fields (open_positions, unrealized_pnl, realized_pnl, total_pnl, trade_count, wins, losses, win_rate, capital_allocated) - PASS
Weather positions have metadata enrichment - PASS
Crypto positions have metadata enrichment - PASS
Positions have display fields (avg_cost, current_price, size, unrealized_pnl, unrealized_pnl_pct) - PASS
total_open matches sum of all buckets (86) - PASS
Weather summary PnL: realized=$0, unrealized=$-1.41, total=$-1.41 - PASS
Strategy attribution has crypto, weather, arb buckets - PASS
Each bucket has realized/unrealized/total PnL fields - PASS

Weather page stat cards: Open Positions (54, $-1.41 unrl), Tradable Signals, Forecast Coverage, Scan Latency - PASS
Weather page PnL bar shows Realized/Unrealized/Total correctly - PASS
Weather page tabs: Open Positions (54), Signals, Executions, Rejected, Forecasts, Calibration, Health - PASS
Weather page Open Positions tab is active by default - PASS

Sniper page tabs: Open Positions (11), Signals, Rejected (50), Executions, Health - PASS
Sniper page Open Positions tab is active by default - PASS
Sniper positions table shows 11 rows with Market, Asset, Side, Entry, Mark, Size, Unrl P&L columns - PASS
Analytics page loads with Strategy Comparison as default tab - PASS
Analytics Strategy Comparison shows exactly 3 strategy cards: CRYPTO, WEATHER, ARB - PASS
CRYPTO card shows Total +$50.23, Realized +$50.23, Unrealized $0.00, Open 11, Closed 1743 - PASS
WEATHER card shows Total $-1.40, Realized $0.00, Unrealized $-1.40, Open 54, Closed 778 - PASS

seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 complete: (1) GET /api/positions/by-strategy returns positions grouped by weather/crypto/arb with summaries containing realized/unrealized/total PnL. (2) Weather page fully rewritten with Open Positions (54) as primary tab showing positions table with Entry, Mark, Size, Unrl P&L columns. PnL bar shows Realized $0 / Unrealized $-1.41 / Total $-1.41. Tabs: Open Positions, Signals, Executions, Rejected, Forecasts, Calibration, Health. (3) Sniper page fully rewritten with Open Positions (11) as primary tab. PnL bar shows Realized $50.23 / Unrealized $0 / Total $50.23. Tabs: Open Positions, Signals, Rejected, Executions, Health. (4) Analytics Strategy Comparison now shows 3 cards (CRYPTO, WEATHER, ARB) instead of 4 - RESOLVER removed. ARB has TOP badge as highest total PnL ($81.89). Comparison table shows Realized/Unrealized/Total PnL breakdown. (5) Auto-refresh working on all pages.
